description: Large size widget recreation from the 2026-06-28 4:20 PM reference screenshots.

identity.background_mood: large mauve glass card with centered album art
identity.typography: SF Pro native sans, heavy centered white hierarchy

layout.progress_placement: bottom row with left and right time labels

Large_Glass_Container.notes: Large mode now uses a dedicated 320 x 432 mauve card.

Top_Left_X_Button.notes: Window behavior X appears at the card top-left on hover without drawing duplicate artwork.

Top_Right_Settings_Dots.notes: Settings ellipsis appears at the top-right and uses the shared readable native popover.

Main_Artwork_and_Info.notes: Centered 260 x 260 art, title, and subtitle match the large reference hierarchy.

Playback_Controls.notes: Visible previous/play/next controls and bottom progress row are implemented.
